Localization.Description: Attempt to perform an action with a system backup or a system backup task

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A system backup is created on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} created a system backup task on host {event_src.host}
Error creating a system backup on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} could not delete a system backup task on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted a system backup task on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} could not restore the system configuration from a backup on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} restored the system configuration from a backup on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} could not create a system backup task on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} created a system backup on host {event_src.host}
